description_long: This object is a stylized pumpkin with a carved face, featuring triangular eyes and a jagged mouth, reminiscent of a classic Halloween jack-o'-lantern. The pumpkin is orange with visible polygonal facets, giving it a low-poly, cartoon-like appearance. The carved sections reveal a glowing pinkish interior, suggesting illumination from within. A green, angular stem sits atop the pumpkin, accompanied by a single green leaf. The pumpkin's surface is matte with subtle shading, and the back is uncarved, showing only the natural pumpkin texture. The overall form is squat and wide, with the carved face being the most prominent feature.
description: A stylized, orange jack-o'-lantern pumpkin with a carved glowing face, green stem, and leaf, featuring a low-poly, cartoon-like appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carved face with glowing eyes and mouth, green stem, and leaf.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the pumpkin's rounded body, partial view of the carved face, and the stem angled backward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the uncarved, natural pumpkin surface and the green stem.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a partial glimpse of the carved face and the stem visible from a different angle.
attribute_carving_pattern: Traditional jack-o'-lantern face with triangular eyes and a jagged, smiling mouth, all cut out to reveal a glowing interior.
